# The first global economy: integration on colonial terms {#sec-ch08}

> *Steam, Suez and empire — peak Western dominance, resting on the ocean it governed.*

::: {.callout-note}
## Draft pending
**Period:** c.1850–1914. This chapter is a stub. Draft it from the standardized template
(`_chapter-template.qmd`) using its story spine
(`teaching/ecu4413_world_econ/module_design/topic_08_story_spine_2026-06-20.md`), the matching topic brief, the
centre-of-gravity ledger, the data compendium, and `datasets_by_topic.md`.
:::
